title: Traditional British Pasties
description: A classic British recipe filled with savory beef, sauerkraut, and spices, wrapped in a flaky pastry.
instructions: Roll out one of the pasties and place on a baking sheet.
Add 1/4 cup of sauerkraut, 1/4 cup of shredded beef, and a sprinkle of salt and pepper to one half of the pastry.
Fold the other half over the filling and press edges to seal.
Brush pastry with an egg wash.
Repeat with remaining pasties and filling.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve hot with sharp cheddar cheese (if using).
